action_set_definitions.name: inspect_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current stock level for a specific SKU at a specific location.

location_id.description: The unique identifier for the warehouse or store.

sku_id.description: The unique identifier for the product stock keeping unit.

action_set_definitions.name: list_location_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Returns a comprehensive list of all SKUs and their respective quantities currently held at a specific location. Useful for calculating total capacity usage.

location_id.description: The ID of the location to query.

action_set_definitions.name: inspect_location_constraints
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves metadata and constraints for a specific location, such as maximum storage capacity.

location_id.description: The unique identifier for the location.

action_set_definitions.name: initiate_stock_transfer
action_set_definitions.description: Moves a specified quantity of a SKU from a source location to a destination location. Updates inventory levels and logs the transit.

from_location_id.description: The ID of the source location.

to_location_id.description: The ID of the destination location.

sku_id.description: The ID of the SKU to be moved.

quantity.description: The number of units to transfer.

state_description.inventory_levels: A nested mapping where keys are location_ids and values are objects mapping SKU_ids to their current quantity in stock.
state_description.transit_log: List of active stock transfers between locations with expected arrival times or steps.
state_description.pending_orders: List of purchase orders sent to external suppliers that have not yet arrived at the warehouse.
state_description.location_metadata: Static constraints for locations, such as maximum storage capacity.
state_description.current_step: Internal counter representing the passage of time or number of operations.
